description: Product Description Remington D3190 2200 ionic hair dryer Remington has been helping the world get ready for over 75 years. Experts in enhanced pride themselves on being at the very cutting-edge of technology and work with top salon professionals from all over the world to produce electrical personal care products that really work, care for you and deliver high results every single time. Safety Warning Do not rinse or submerge in water. Do not use while bathing.
